Gud place to stay

Breeze Residency is the oldest Hotel in Trichy town. It is more than 35 years old and has enough rooms to cater for a big Wedding Group. The hotel has a swimming pool and a gym. The gym will shortly be going under renovation. The pool is a 25 m pool with 5 swim lanes. A small pool for kids is also adjacent to the main pool.

The rooms are good quality with all amenities. We get 24*7 hot water in the restroom.

The restaurant is a Chinese themed one and offer buffet as well as Al a cart service. The hotel serves a plethora of cuisines which are good to eat.

The hotel is just 2 mins away from Trichy Bus Stand and Railway station. Even the airport is hardly 20 mins away. Centrally located the hotel is 20 mins away from the famous Trichy temples as well.

If you want to stay lavishly then this is the hotel you should aim for
